title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, stream, embed, pull models, and manage the local server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer letting you swap in any Ollama-hosted model as an LLM or chat endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama—Markdown, code highlighting, model manager, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair-programmer inside the editor.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting and generating text with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Declarative Nix package and module for running Ollama services on NixOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama containerized.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama for embeddings + generation and Chroma as vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-mistral-7b-benchmark
summary: Official benchmark scripts comparing Mistral-7B throughput on CPU vs GPU with Ollama.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated list of community-contributed Modelfiles for Llama-3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, Vicuna, etc.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-streamlit-chat
summary: Streamlit chat component template that streams Ollama responses with markdown and code highlighting.
